name: Outflow
description: Mitigate hitching when new users join a session you are hosting
author: Cyro

releases.changelog:
This releases fixes an edge case on .NET 4.7.2 where the mod won't load the patches.

- Fixed edge case on Windows .NET 4.7.2 where the Outflow patches won't load due to their classes never being constructed.


Enjoy!

It's here, fellas! I've been waiting to do a full release until I've verified that A) Our networking libraries *are* infact thread-safe, and B) That the mod itself doesn't cause any subtle corruptions in the networking. This is functionally identical to 0.0.1.0 (aside from conditionally-compiled debug prints that don't exist in the release build)

As always, be sure to keep an eye out for issues but I'm quite certain this build should be safe to use on your client/headless equally. Keep in mind that only the host of the session requires the mod for everyone to benefit. This is **not** required by other clients, won't do anything in sessions you don't own.

Also we're going back to 3-place version numbers since 4 isn't compatible with the mod manifest - you'll find it on there soon™™

Anyways,

Enjoy!

This release fixes some issues with packet ordering by completely re-doing the methodology behind how the mod works to be far more pragmatic.

- Completely re-work to only process streams on a separate thread while leaving the normal packet queue alone
    - This should fix issues with the packet order that arose from the previous method (invasive full function replacement)
    - This ensures streams keep flowing while the normal packet queue remains untouched, should increase stability significantly
- Added new graphs to and description to README

As always, keep an eye out for issues! This should hopefully be the last pre-release before slapping the big green sticker on it.

Enjoy!

This release fixes compatibility with .NET 8 (Supported by Resonite Headless servers via [Cumulo Patcher](https://github.com/RileyGuy/Cumulo)) by using the correct compatible harmony version.

- Fix .NET 8 compatibility
- Use non-monomod methods to ensure full compatibility with regular Harmony

Enjoy!

This is an initial pre-release of Outflow! Please report any issues you have with this as I haven't tested this in a very large, populated sessions.

This very much shouldn't corrupt the state of the world, but do be aware that it's a distinct possibility! You have been warned!

Regardless,

Enjoy!

author: dfgHiatus

name: MTLImporter
description: Allows importing Wavefront .mtl files as material orbs
author: dfgHiatus

releases.changelog:
## What's Changed
* Fix issue #1 by @Xlinka in https://github.com/dfgHiatus/MTLImporter/pull/2

## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dfgHiatus/MTLImporter/compare/v2.0.0...v2.0.1

name: SVGImporter
description: Allows importing SVG (Scalable Vector Graphics) files as 3D models. Requires Blender to be installed on the system or in [RESONITE PATH]/tools/Blender.

description: Skips the countdown in the hyperlink open dialog

description: Allows importing VRML 1.0/2.0 and X3D files. Requires Blender to be installed on the system or in [RESONITE PATH]/tools/Blender.

author: dfgHiatus

name: HeadCullingMask

author: headassbtw

name: SessionTweaks
description: Add these 3 buttons, 'Spawn' as spawn session orb, 'Open' as join session without focusing' and 'Copy' as copies session uri in Contacts tab.
author: kazu0617

name: DisableGamepads
description: Completely disables all gamepad inputs (e.g. from an Xbox Controller) in Resonite. The original was created by Lexevo.

releases.changelog: Initial Release

name: Harmony
description: A library for patching, replacing and decorating .NET and Mono methods during runtime.
author: pardeike

name: DynamicDesyncHelper
description: Dynamically adjusts the LNL Window Size to avoid desyncing.
author: Raidriar

name: DynamicTickRate
description: Adjusts the tick rate of the headless client based on user and world count.
author: Raidriar

name: FastSync
description: Improves compression speed for sync messages.
author: Raidriar

name: HDRProbeFix
description: Fixes reflection probes baking incorrectly.
author: Raidriar

name: HeadlessUserCulling
description: Provides a user culling system managed by the headless client.
author: Raidriar

name: IkCulling
description: Disables the IK of Users who are behind you or far away. Includes optional IK throttling.
author: Raidriar

name: LiteStreams
description: Reduces outbound network traffic.
author: Raidriar

name: NoSteamScreenshots
description: Prevents in app photos from additionally being saved to Steam.
author: Raidriar

name: Resurfacer
description: Adds batch texture operations.
author: Raidriar

name: StresslessHeadless
description: Disables select functionality from running on headless clients.
author: Raidriar

name: Lognt
description: Allows for disabling all logs, warnings, and errors from being written to disk.
author: Raidriar

name: yt-dlp Updater
description: Runs the built in update function for yt-dlp on startup, includes option to change the update branch.
author: Raidriar

name: 3DDashOnScreenResonite
description: Resonite Mod Loader mod, that replaces 2D overlay dash in Screen mode with the regular VR one
author: rampa3

name: LocalAllowList
description: Lets you use a local user allow list on a headless configured through console commands.
author: OrionMoonclaw

name: PreventWebsocketCrash
description: Fixes a randomly occuring world crash when receiving events from a websocket.
author: OrionMoonclaw

name: AvatarCreatorUtils
description: Options to add info to avatars during creation and clean up proxies.
author: badhaloninja

name: DeselectOwnGizmos
description: Adds the ability to deselect the user's own gizmos
author: badhaloninja

name: EnumDropdown
description: Adds a dropdown for enum fields
author: badhaloninja

releases.changelog:
### Rebuild for the Resonite settings rework
- There are no new changes

Initial release for the [Resonite Mod Manifest](https://github.com/resonite-modding-group/resonite-mod-manifest)
- Updated harmony ID to `ninja.badhalo.EnumDropdown`
- Cleaned up build files

- Ported to Resonite

# ⚠ Any release prior to 2.0.0 is for [NeosVR](https://neos.com/).

- Add support for nullable enums - #2 
- Switch to patching the LogixNode class instead of generating individual patches for EnumInput<E> - #3 by @EIA485
  - This greatly improves loading times

- Fix interacting with certain flag enums that are defined using non int values
 - Adjust flag selection ui
- Fix enum input logix node dropping slot into parent on pack
Initial release

name: FixAltEnter
description: Fixes alt + enter not respecting monitor resolution
author: badhaloninja

name: FixSelectionRadiusScale
description: Makes the Developer Tool's selection radius dependent on scale, fixes issues selecting what you want when scaled down
author: badhaloninja

name: FriendlyInventoryAvatars
description: Makes the inventory only clear blocking avatars when equipping
author: badhaloninja

name: ResoniteModSettings
description: Adds a dash screen to show and edit mods and their configs
author: badhaloninja

name: Optizoom
description: Adds the ability to zoom
author: badhaloninja

name: OrbCartridgeAutoScoop
description: Makes orb based tools grab a new orb regardless if there is already an orb in the tool
author: badhaloninja

releases.changelog:
- Updated Harmony mod id to `ninja.badhalo.OrbCartridgeAutoScoop`
- Cleaned up project to my modern standards

- Ported to Resonite
- Cleaned up project
- Added support for the MeshTool
- Added option to hide the 'Scoop Mode' from the context menu
- Added option to disable the 'Eject Orb' button
- Added option to disable the mod behavior

# ⚠ Any release prior to 2.0.0 is for [NeosVR](https://neos.com/).
Fixed issue of material conversion not working when "Pick up materials when created" option is enabled (#1)
Added the option to auto scoop materials when created via the CreateNewDialog
Config support
Initial release

name: ShowObjectRootSlotNameInSubtitleOnInspectorsForSelectedSlotMod
description: The mod that shows the ObjectRoot slot name in subtitle on inspectors for the selected slot
author: badhaloninja

name: BC7EncMod
description: Encodes BC1, BC3, BC4, BC5, and BC7 LZMA textures through bc7enc instead of compressonator.
author: yosh

name: CollectionEditor
description: Adds a form for editing certain types of collections
author: yosh

name: ContextMenuHookLib
description: Library for adding prefix hooks to functions that make context menu items
author: yosh

name: DirectoryCopyURL
description: Fixes the "Get Url" button in the inventory to copy directory URLs as well.
author: yosh

name: EmpoweredImageEncoding
description: Configure Resonite image encoding & quick photo quality parameters
author: yosh

name: FasterFirstCasts
description: Faster first node overload casting by only searching ProtoFlux nodes
author: yosh

name: NullableInputUI
description: Adds basic UI for nullable input nodes.
author: yosh

name: SpeedyImpulseValidation
description: Optimizes the impulse validation code such that complex impulse chains don't start hitching the game.
author: yosh

name: X11Clipboard
description: Work around fix for X11 clipboard not functioning. requires xclip in your Resonite install directory
author: yosh

name: VDFaceTracking
description: Virtual Desktop face tracking mod for Resonite.
author: Zeith

name: HeadlessToolPermissionKickCrashFix
description: A Headless Server mod that prevented tool permission kicks from causing a world crash. This is no longer needed as of Beta 2024.3.12.1169.
author: Nytra

releases.changelog:
Released the mod.

Thanks to Rucio for porting the mod to Resonite and sending me the code, thanks to Stiefeljackal and TheSpecterLemon for testing it.

name: AccessibleFullBodyCalibrator
description: Adds a button to the T-Pose Calibration step of the Full Body Calibrator to allow completing the step if you are unable to use two controllers.
author: Nytra

releases.changelog: Released the mod for Resonite.

name: ColorMyProtoFlux
description: Apply colors to your ProtoFlux nodes. Highly configurable.
author: Nytra

name: ComponentMemberReplicator
description: Adds a wizard to allow copying selected values from a source component and applying them to one or many other components of the same Type. Can also (re)create drives.
author: Nytra

name: ComponentSearchWizard
description: Adds a wizard to allow searching for components that exist on slots in the current world. You can search by type and/or by name, and get a list of references as output.
author: Nytra

name: ExpandedMemberEditors
description: Adds basic inspector UI for SyncVar and SyncDictionary.
author: Nytra

name: FixSessionBrowser
description: A mod that fixed the session browser. This is no longer needed as of Beta 2024.1.30.731.
author: Nytra

name: HotReloadLib
description: Library for Resonite mod developers to hot reload their mods without needing to restart the whole game.
author: Nytra

name: InspectorDelegateCaller
description: Adds some buttons to inspector UI for workers that have callable delegates.
author: Nytra

name: InterprocessLib
description: Library that allows mods to send data to the renderer and back.
author: Nytra

name: LeftHandedProtoFlux
description: Makes ProtoFlux flow from right to left.
author: Nytra

name: LogFlush
description: A mod primarily for developers that flushes the log stream when you press the F1 key, causing all buffered messages to be written to the log file.
author: Nytra

name: NoTankControls-InspectorScrollCompatible
description: Don't lock up joystick movement while tools are equipped. Very helpful on Quest. This version has tweaks to work better with InspectorScroll.
author: Nytra

name: PluginSelect
description: Adds some extra UI to the "Start Custom Session" dialog to allow you to select which data model plugins to use for that session.
author: Nytra

name: ReferenceFinderWizard
description: Adds a wizard that lets you find references to things. You can also find references via dev tool or inspectors. Has options to adjust the search and can optionally spawn a detailed text output.
author: Nytra

name: ScrollableFieldEditors
description: Allows clicking into inspector fields and then scrolling to change the value.
author: Nytra

name: WorldListSessionHider
description: A mod that hides session info and thumbnails in your session browser based on the host's userID/username, the world ID or the session ID.
author: Nytra

name: HeadlessTweaks
description: Adds some nice to have features to headless clients. To use the discord related options `Discord.Net.Webhook`, `Discord.Net.Rest`, and `Discord.Net.Core` libraries are required, view the readme for more information.
author: New_Project_Final_Final_WIP

name: EyeTrackVR
description: Enables EyetrackVR eye tracking into Resonite

name: Varjo Eyetracking

name: NoDoubleTapSprint

name: DynTunes
